  "claims": [
    "By 2050, plastic production will exceed 20% of global oil production.",
    "AB 2236 is a critical step to eliminate plastic pollution.",
    "AB 2236 eliminates single-use plastic bags at grocery stores.",
    "The reusable plastic bag introduced by SB 270 in 2013 has proven to be a less sustainable option that is not reused or recycled.",
